blocks.text: Hovland two shots back — THE PLAYERS R3 live at TPC Sawgrass

Glimt's 3-0 demolition of Sporting CP is one of Norwegian football's finest European nights. Knutsen's side dream of the quarterfinals — while Arsenal (1-1 Leverkusen) and Liverpool (0-1 Galatasaray) had harder evenings.
🎮 ESL Pro League S22 — rain (FaZe) in top-tier CS2 action, ongoing
🚴 Tirreno-Adriatico — Leknessund and Wærenskjold flying Norwegian colours through Italy
